title: monarda fistulosa var. mollis
intro: Monarda fistulosa var. mollis is a soft-leaved variant of the bee balm plant, a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Monarda fistulosa var. mollis include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to support immune system function and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
